title: genista tinctoria subsp. elatior
intro: Genista tinctoria subsp. elatior, also known as tall dyers greenweed, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Genista tinctoria subsp. elatior is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
